nodes.name: Elyndor
nodes.summary: Working name for the world of The Last Sword Protocol.

nodes.name: Ashford Vale
nodes.summary: Starting region for Journey I; teaches overworld exploration, authentication, access control, and trust.

nodes.name: Ashford Village
nodes.summary: Starting village and emotional home base for the hero.

nodes.name: Hidden Cave
nodes.summary: First adventure site leading to the Last Sword discovery.

nodes.name: Sword Shrine
nodes.summary: Ancient chamber where the sword authenticates the hero.

nodes.name: Glassfield Ruins
nodes.summary: First post-sword sealed site that reveals the sword can open ancient systems.

nodes.name: First Relay
nodes.summary: First ancient relay restored by the hero; awakens wider network behavior and unlocks departure.

nodes.name: Rustshore Dock
nodes.summary: Weathered coastal departure point to the next region.

nodes.name: The Hero
nodes.summary: Young villager authenticated by the Last Sword; not royalty or prophecy-based.

nodes.name: Rowan
nodes.summary: Village elder and local historian who understands legends but misunderstands the ancient technology.

nodes.name: The Last Sword
nodes.summary: A Protocol Blade that functions as both weapon and authenticated interface into the ancient network.

nodes.name: Authentication
nodes.summary: Cybersecurity concept represented in fantasy as worthiness, recognition, or being chosen by the sword.

nodes.name: Access Control
nodes.summary: Cybersecurity concept represented by sacred seals, ancient doors, and restricted ruins.
